## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Localization
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security or privacy

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`.
- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I did not include real personal or family data.
- [ ] I used existing design tokens where possible.
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed.
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes.

## Privacy Impact

Does this change affect user data, family data, reminders, invite links, logs, analytics, or screenshots?

If yes, explain the impact and mitigation.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes.
